ch14_start.text: Before you can even process the betrayal, the main station lights turn a deep, bloody red. A siren begins to wail. An automated voice echoes: 'SCUTTLE PROTOCOL INITIATED. EXPLOSIVE CHARGES ARMED. DETONATION IN T-MINUS 10 MINUTES.'

ch14_gideon_realize.text: You check the terminal logs. The protocol wasn't automated by the breach. Gideon Stroud manually initiated the self-destruct sequence ten minutes ago, right after abandoning the lower decks.

choices.text: Check the location of the escape pods.

ch14_pods.text: You pull up the schematics. All the escape pods in the lower sectors have been jettisoned empty or destroyed by the organism. There is only one pod left, located in Gideon's private Executive Bay.

ch14_run.text: You sprint through the collapsing corridors. The station is tearing itself apart. The organism is everywhere, bursting from the pipes and vents, but the impending explosion seems to have thrown the hive mind into a frenzy.

choices.text: Force your way to the Executive Bay.

ch14_end.text: You reach the heavy, ornate doors of the Executive Bay. Inside is the only way back to the surface. And inside is Gideon.
